archetype: Performance Pro mixed with Comic Brutalism

layout_spacing.philosophy: Dense, grid-based, hard edges with solid drop shadows to emulate comic panels.
layout_spacing.grid: Bento-style Control Room (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with gap-4 or gap-6.

components.cards: bg-[#18181B] border-2 border-[#3F3F46] rounded-none p-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(63,63,70,1)] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(255,230,0,1)] hover:border-[#FFE600]
components.buttons: bg-[#FFE600] text-black border-2 border-[#FFE600] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none py-3 px-6 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none
components.inputs: bg-[#09090B] border-2 border-[#3F3F46] text-white focus:border-[#00E5FF] focus:ring-0 rounded-none p-3
components.badges: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-bold uppercase px-3 py-1 text-xs border-2 border-black shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

visual_enhancers.texture: Implement a subtle CSS halftone dot pattern on the body background. Use radial-gradient dots to give it that comic book print feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: Thick 2px borders are mandatory on interactive elements to emulate comic inking.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Bold weight) to match the thick comic strokes. Run: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

pages.auth: Split-screen layout. Left side: The hero_auth_image with a heavy dark overlay or duotone effect. Right side: Solid #09090B background, heavy inputs, and a massive #FFE600 login button.
pages.dashboard: Bento grid layout. The 'Current Weight' and 'PRs' should feel like comic sound-effect panels (massive bold numbers, tight leading).
pages.calendar: Strict table grid. The 'Today' cell must be highlighted with a solid #FFE600 background and black text, overriding default Shadcn soft styles.
pages.workout_logger: High-visibility rows for sets/reps. Use #00E5FF to highlight the active/current set. Inputs should be boxy and utilitarian.
pages.analytics: Charts (Recharts) should use high-contrast neon lines (#FFE600, #00E5FF, #FF0055) against dark grid backgrounds. Avoid soft gradients; use solid strokes and fills.

hero_auth_image.description: Man performing bench press in a dimly lit gym, focused on weight training.

dashboard_empty_state.description: grayscale photo of man working out

avatar_placeholder.description: A man smiles, posing in a studio.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure black text is used on #FFE600 (Yellow) and #00E5FF (Cyan) backgrounds. White text on #18181B cards.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Focus states must be explicitly styled with a 2px #00E5FF ring.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, toggles, calendar days, workout list items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install necessary dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react recharts
Modify tailwind.config.js to include the custom color palette (primary: #FFE600, secondary: #00E5FF, accent: #FF0055).
Set font imports in index.html or index.css via Google Fonts: <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Outfit:wght@400;600;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
Update Shadcn UI primitives to have `rounded-none` and apply the hard shadow classes mentioned in layout_spacing.components.
Do NOT use standard soft shadows (shadow-md, shadow-lg). Replace them with solid drop shadows like shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(63,63,70,1)].
Add a CSS-based halftone pattern to index.css body: `background-image: radial-gradient(#3F3F46 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 8px 8px;`
